title: Migratory bird conservation: publications - Canada.ca
content:
## Migratory bird conservation: publications
- Handbook for managing canada geese and cackling geese in southern Canada
- Conserve Ontario's Carolinian Forests: preserve songbird species at risk
- Bird conservation strategy for Region 12: Ontario and Manitoba boreal hardwood transition
- Bird conservation strategy for Region 13: Lower Great Lakes/St. Lawrence Plain boreal hardwood transition
- Bird conservation strategy for region 5: Northern Pacific rainforest
- Bird conservation strategy for Region 8: Ontario boreal softwood shield

- Bank swallow (Riparia riparia) in sandpits and quarries
